scripts.report:bundle:open: npx allure generate -o ./allure-report && node framework/utils/bundle-allure-report.js && start allure-report.html
scripts.ai:lifecycle:full: node framework/ai/scripts/run-lifecycle.js --phase pre && cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test && node framework/ai/scripts/run-lifecycle.js --phase post
scripts.smoke:heal:headed: cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test tests/generated/ --project chrome --headed
scripts.smoke:heal:report: npm run clean:allure && cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test tests/generated/ --project chrome --headed && npm run report:allure
scripts.execute:smoke: npm run clean:allure & npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome & node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
scripts.execute:smoke:heal: npm run clean:allure & cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome & node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
scripts.execute:smoke:lambda: npm run clean:allure && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda node framework/utils/lambdatest-status.js && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
scripts.ci:smoke: npm run clean:allure && npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome && npm run ci:report && node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
scripts.ci:smoke:heal: npm run clean:allure && cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome --retries 1 && npm run ci:report && node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
scripts.ci:smoke:lambda: npm run clean:allure && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda node framework/utils/lambdatest-status.js && npm run ci:report && node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
scripts.ci:smoke:lambda:heal: npm run clean:allure && cross-env AI_HEALING_ENABLED=true EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda npx playwright test tests/generated/smoke/smoke-suite.spec.js --project chrome --retries 1 && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda node framework/utils/lambdatest-status.js && npm run ci:report && node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
scripts.test:lambda:smoke: npm run clean:allure && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda npx playwright test --project tc-smoke && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda node framework/utils/lambdatest-status.js && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
scripts.test:lambda:export-clip: npm run clean:allure && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda npx playwright test tests/export-clip.spec.js --project chrome && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda node framework/utils/lambdatest-status.js && cross-env EXECUTION_PLATFORM=lambda node framework/utils/slack-notify.js
